description: You are a Structural BIM Technician. Create a new IFC foundation layout model named 'Hartwell Foundation' in Bonsai (BlenderBIM). Establish a spatial hierarchy (Project, Site, Building, Storey) including a building storey named 'Foundation Level' at a negative elevation. Model five IfcFooting elements (four pad footings and one strip footing) on this level. Create and assign an IFC material with 'Concrete' in its name to at least one footing. Save the project as an IFC file to /home/ga/BIMProjects/foundation_layout.ifc.
